query:
SELECT id, vapiCallId, sessionId, callerPhone, durationSeconds, outcome, 
  LEFT(transcript, 100) as transcriptSnippet,
  LEFT(summary, 100) as summarySnippet,
  recordingUrl IS NOT NULL as hasRecording,
  createdAt
FROM voice_calls 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 5;
command:

  LEFT(transcript, 100) as transcriptSnippet,
  LEFT(summary, 100) as summarySnippet,
  recordingUrl IS NOT NULL as hasRecording,
  createdAt
FROM voice_calls 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 5;
